calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-11-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance is made in this matter.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC'S Motion To Vacate Judgment is GRANTED. No opposition filed.

Counsel for the plaintiff is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed and must email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the hearing.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: proceedings not reported.
